records.title: Keep installed and repo-root skill entry points synchronized
records.description: The repo-root SKILL.md and installed .github/skills/SKILL.md entry point must always resolve to the same instructions, version stamp, and reference-resolution guidance so fallback path selection never changes the operator brief.

records.title: Treat reference_docs as the authoritative Phase 1 docs input
records.description: Modern installs that provide reference_docs must not be downgraded or warned as code-only because docs_gathered is absent; runner messaging and exploration behavior must align with the canonical reference_docs contract.

records.title: Enforce the full Phase 2 exploration-artifact gate
records.description: A run must not advance beyond Phase 1 unless quality/EXPLORATION.md satisfies the exact heading and content checks named in the Phase 2 skill contract, not just a file-exists and line-count threshold.

records.title: Preserve actual project classification in live run metadata
records.description: Once a target is classified as Code, Skill, or Hybrid, that exact value must survive into live quality/INDEX.md metadata rather than collapsing to a default Code label.

records.title: Restrict cleanup to playbook-owned worker processes
records.description: Operator cleanup must remain scoped to recorded run workers; missing PID files must not trigger workstation-wide pattern kills across unrelated Claude or Copilot sessions.

records.title: Retain byte-equality citation verification on installed targets
records.description: If the repository advertises byte-verified citation excerpts for reference_docs/cite, installed targets must receive the verifier dependency needed for quality_gate.py to enforce that guarantee rather than downgrading it to a warning.

records.title: Keep curated bootstrap docs current with the live release
records.description: Curated bootstrap/self-audit docs may compress context, but they must not present an older current version or obsolete documentation path as the live product surface when describing the current release.

records.title: Expose the same documentation surface in direct and harness bootstrap modes
records.description: Running the playbook directly at the repo root and running it through the benchmark harness must expose the same effective documentation tree to Phase 1 so self-audit and installed runs remain comparable.
